testcase.name: test_checkout_valid_package_returns_stripe_url_and_creates_pending_tx
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_billing.py:93: in test_checkout_valid_package_returns_stripe_url_and_creates_pending_tx assert st.status_code == 200, st.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Could not fetch status: Failed to retrieve session status: Request req_MuyyeWSeWsQzJj: No such checkout.session: cs_test_a196Dk2yHTDbEImQD02eO8yh9aQOzU55Cil6pBfXPdZ3SjQKk373ofIrBd"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
